samp_collect_device: Remotely Operated Vehicle: Hot Fluid Sampler
samp_store_method_additional: Water samples were collected via the Hot Fluid Sampler (HFS) onboard a remotely operated vehicle (ROV). Water filtered in situ across a 0.22 micron disk filter that was flooded after sampling with RNALater.
prep_method_additional: After in situ filtration, RNALater loaded into a special comparment of the filter housing is flooded across the filter. On return to the ship, filter is removed and stored at 4˚C overnight, then stored at -20˚C.
verbatimStationName: Axial Seamount - Transit at Int'l District
samp_collect_method: Water samples were collected via the Hot Fluid Sampler (HFS) onboard a remotely operated vehicle (ROV). Water filtered in situ across a 0.22 micron disk filter that was flooded after sampling with RNALater.
samp_collect_notes: Field Sample Name: J2-965-HFS-4 F10 - Additional Location Description: near-bottom water within the International District vent field - Field Notes: Roaming around a vent field, should have lots of diversity
DepthInMeters_method: In situ filters are collected from a single inlet, maximumDepthInMeters and minimumDepthInMeters are the same.
altitude_method: Measurement from altitude sensor on Remotely Operated Vehicle.
measurements_from: All environmental metadata measurements reported for this sample are taken from ROV data files unless otherwise indicated in the measurement field's corresponding method field. If not specified in the corresponding method field, then the field was measured, not calculated.
